channel.title: Defense-in-Depth on SOPHY'S CYBERLAB
channel.description: Recent content in Defense-in-Depth on SOPHY'S CYBERLAB

item.title: Network Traffic Analysis & Automated Threat Mitigation
item.description: Objective: To identify suspicious network traffic using protocol analysis and implement multi-layered blocking mechanisms to secure a local environment.

item.title: Network Security Fundamentals and Threat Assessment
item.description: Objective: To conduct a comprehensive study of network threat vectors and security controls to establish a foundational defense strategy for organizational environments.

item.title: Secure Session Architecture & Defensive Flag Implementation
item.description: Objective: To implement a “Secure-by-Design” framework for web applications to neutralize cookie-based attack vectors.
